title: TZ-4 BEM-1284 minimal loop
objective:
Create file governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

RUNNER_ID = "minimal_governance_loop_runner"
READINESS_LEVEL = "FUNCTIONAL"

def build_trace() -> dict:
    trace_id = "bem1284_minimal_local_e2e"
    steps = [
        {"role":"GD","action":"route_task","status":"ok"},
        {"role":"DIR","action":"plan_minimal_execution","status":"ok"},
        {"role":"ANALYST","action":"analyze_input","status":"ok"},
        {"role":"AUDITOR","action":"pre_execution_audit","status":"ok"},
        {"role":"WRK","action":"execute_stub","status":"ok"},
        {"role":"AUDITOR","action":"post_execution_audit","status":"ok"}
    ]
    return {"trace_id":trace_id,"runner_id":RUNNER_ID,"readiness_level":READINESS_LEVEL,"status":"functional_stub_e2e","release_pass":False,"timestamp_utc":datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),"steps":steps}

def main() -> int:
    trace = build_trace()
    out = Path("governance/state/OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json")
    out.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    out.write_text(json.dumps(trace, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    print(json.dumps(trace, ensure_ascii=False, sort_keys=True))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
Create file tests/governance/test_bem1284_minimal_governance_loop.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys
from pathlib import Path

def test_bem1284_minimal_loop_writes_real_trace():
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "governance/runners/minimal_governance_loop_runner.py"], capture_output=True, text=True, check=True)
    data = json.loads(result.stdout)
    assert data["trace_id"] == "bem1284_minimal_local_e2e"
    assert data["readiness_level"] == "FUNCTIONAL"
    assert data["release_pass"] is False
    out = Path("governance/state/OBJ-GD-001_last_run.json")
    assert out.exists()
    saved = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert saved["trace_id"] == data["trace_id"]
    assert len(saved["steps"]) >= 6
